title: doeverything Managed Storage
description: Enterprise-managed policies for doeverything. Administrators can deploy this schema via Chrome managed policies to enforce site-level restrictions.

blockedUrlPatterns.title: Blocked URL Patterns
blockedUrlPatterns.description: List of URL patterns doeverything must refuse to navigate to. Patterns support `*` wildcards and match against hostname + path. The scheme (http/https) and `www.` prefix are stripped before matching; bare domains are interpreted as `<domain>/*`.
